name: Ananya Das
text: This platform has made it so easy to find doctors and emergency services. It's very user-friendly and reliable.

name: Rahul Sharma
text: The bus and ferry schedules are always accurate. I can plan my daily travel without any confusion.

name: Dr. Priya Mehta
text: As a doctor, I appreciate how efficiently this platform connects patients with healthcare providers.

name: Amit Verma
text: The events feature helps us reach a wider audience. It's great for community engagement.

name: Sneha Kapoor
text: Very helpful app! I especially like the emergency contacts and transport updates.

name: Rohit Singh
text: Everything is available in one place—transport, healthcare, and events. Saves a lot of time.
